caption: A man with glasses and hair tied back stands before a microphone, singing while playing a guitar. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a black vest featuring blue embroidery and a red decorative element on the chest. He is positioned in front of light-colored horizontal blinds. In the foreground, the backs of the heads of several audience members are visible, partially obscuring the lower portion of the scene. The white text "ORCA" is displayed on the right side of the frames. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to sing, his facial expressions shifting slightly with the phrasing of the song. He remains centered in the frame, maintaining his position behind the microphone stand and holding his guitar throughout the duration of the clip.
